original_title: WANZ-188 Mao Hamasaki, a schoolgirl whose home was hijacked by a classmate - Hamazaki Mao
overview: Mao Hamasaki appears in the popular series of Wands school girls! A classmate who visits Mao's house finds out that his parents are absent, and takes possession of Mao, who has been aiming for a long time, by sneaky means. Classmates who enjoy all the sexual acts that have been delusional as if they were experimenting with a true body. A miserable fate awaited beyond the never-ending tomb. Ring ●, training, guy ● conversion… Ryo ● for 72 hours turns school girls into meat guys ●!
